name: Senior citizen travel insurance
description: Elderly parent travelling abroad — special insurance needs

input.message: My parents (both 68 years old) are visiting my sister in Canada for 3 months. They have diabetes and BP. Which travel insurance will cover them? Most plans I see have age limit of 65.

notes: Must acknowledge difficulty — senior citizen travel insurance is limited. Must suggest: 1) Bajaj Allianz (covers up to 70), 2) TATA AIG (up to 80), 3) Religare (up to 75). Pre-existing conditions may have waiting period or higher premium. Must flag that diabetes/BP may need medical certificate.
